title: Lotus Blooms
description: Decorate ponds, gardens, and waterside builds with detailed 3D pink, white, red, and purple lotus flowers.
body:
# Lotus Blooms

Bring peaceful color and life to your Minecraft waterscapes with **Lotus & Pond**, a lightweight decorative Fabric mod featuring beautifully modeled lotus flowers for ponds, gardens, courtyards, temples, and nature-inspired builds.

Whether you are creating a quiet garden pond, an elegant courtyard water feature, or an atmospheric lakeside landscape, these lotus flowers provide a simple way to add natural detail and charm to your world.

## Available Lotus Flowers

Choose from four decorative lotus flower variants:

* **Pink Lotus Flower** — soft and classic, perfect for natural ponds and gardens
* **White Lotus Flower** — clean and elegant, suitable for peaceful or temple-inspired builds
* **Red Lotus Flower** — vivid and eye-catching, adding warmth and contrast to your water features
* **Purple Lotus Flower** — gentle and dreamy, ideal for magical or atmospheric landscapes

## Features

* Four decorative lotus flower variants: **Pink, White, Red, and Purple**
* Refined 3D lotus flower models created with **Blockbench**
* Can be placed on both **land and water**
* Custom inventory icons for clear and attractive item display
* English and Simplified Chinese language support
* Lightweight decorative content designed for building and landscaping
* Convenient command for quickly obtaining all lotus variants in Creative building

## Great For

Lotus flowers are designed to complement:

* Garden ponds
* Courtyard water features
* Temples and Asian-inspired builds
* Lakes, rivers, and wetlands
* Nature-themed landscapes
* Peaceful, fantasy, or decorative builds

## Commands

With cheats enabled or sufficient command permissions, you can quickly obtain all lotus flowers using:

```mcfunction
/lotus_give_all
```

This command gives you **64 of each lotus flower variant**.

You can also obtain each lotus flower individually:

```mcfunction
/give @s lotusmod:lotus_flower 64
/give @s lotusmod:white_lotus_flower 64
/give @s lotusmod:red_lotus_flower 64
/give @s lotusmod:purple_lotus_flower 64
```

## Visual Settings Notice

For the best visual appearance when viewing lotus flowers from a distance, it is recommended to set:

**Options → Video Settings → Mipmap Levels → OFF**

When Mipmap Levels are enabled, lotus textures may appear blurry or display unusual visual patterns at a distance.

## Requirements

* **Minecraft:** 26.1.2
* **Mod Loader:** Fabric
* **Required Dependency:** Fabric API

## Feedback

Thank you for trying **Lotus & Pond**!

Suggestions, bug reports, feedback, and screenshots of your builds are always welcome in the comments. I hope these lotus flowers help make your ponds, gardens, and landscapes feel more peaceful and beautiful.

## Disclaimer
